top_findings.name: sarfaraz-munir/Claude-Code-Cyber-agents
top_findings.description: Hierarchical CISO AI agent swarm for Claude Code — 10 specialist agents covering   risk governance, compliance, threat intelligence, vulnerability management, incident response, and AI security (OWASP LLM Top 10 / MITRE ATLAS). Includes MCP tools,   Claude Code skills etc.

top_findings.name: AlizHarb/agent-skills
top_findings.description: A growing collection of high-quality Agent Skills for AI coding assistants. Enhance Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and compatible agents with specialized knowledge for Laravel, software architecture, debugging, testing, security, code quality, documentation, and engineering best practices.
